title:
PROMPT 004: Arrow вЂ” Swipe Up CTA
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1080Г—1920px (9:16 Vertical)
DURATION: 1.6s | LOOP: Yes
SVG: Upward chevron arrow (2 paths, 8px stroke, no fill) вЂ” position at 540Г—1680px (bottom of frame), 90px wide

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: transparent (overlay use вЂ” no background)
Arrow stroke: #FFFFFF
Arrow glow: #FFFFFF40 (white, 25% opacity)

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Three stacked chevrons at bottom. Top chevron at 1680px Y, middle at 1730px, bottom at 1780px.
Each 90px wide, spaced 50px apart vertically. All stroke white, 8px.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (1.6s loopable):
0вЂ“0.25s: Bottom arrow fades in (opacity 0 в†’ 0.3)
0.25вЂ“0.5s: Middle arrow fades in (opacity 0 в†’ 0.6)
0.5вЂ“0.75s: Top arrow fades in (opacity 0 в†’ 1.0)
0.75вЂ“1.1s: All arrows translate upward 22px together (ease-in-out)
1.1вЂ“1.3s: All arrows fade out (opacity в†’ 0, ease-in)
1.3вЂ“1.6s: Reset invisible, pause before loop

EASING CURVES:
- Staggered fade: ease-out
- Float up: ease-in-out
- Fade out: ease-in
